business.name: Workflow Partners
business.pageTitle: Workflow Partners — Automation for Growing Businesses
business.metaDescription: Automation consulting for small and mid-size businesses. We audit your workflows, build custom automations, and keep them running.

hero.tagline: Stop doing work a machine should do
hero.subtitle: We help small and mid-size businesses eliminate repetitive tasks, connect their tools, and build automations that actually stick.
hero.ctaSubtext: No commitment. We'll show you what's possible.

problemStatement.heading: Sound familiar?
problemStatement.subheading: Most growing businesses hit the same walls once manual processes can't keep up.

painPoints.title: Manual data entry everywhere
painPoints.description: Your team copies information between tools, reformats spreadsheets, and double-checks records that should update themselves.

painPoints.title: Disconnected tools
painPoints.description: Your CRM doesn't talk to your invoicing. Your forms don't feed your project tracker. Nothing is wired together.

painPoints.title: Things falling through cracks
painPoints.description: Follow-ups get missed, onboarding steps get skipped, and important notifications never reach the right person.

services.heading: What we automate
services.subheading: Six areas where most small businesses lose the most time.

items.title: Client & Lead Management
items.description: Capture leads, onboard new clients, and nurture prospects without manual follow-up.

items.title: Billing & Financial Ops
items.description: Automate invoicing, payment tracking, and financial data sync across your tools.

items.title: Documents & Data Collection
items.description: Collect, organize, and extract data from documents and forms automatically.

items.title: Reporting & Analytics
items.description: Consolidate data from multiple tools into dashboards and automated reports.

items.title: Internal Ops & Productivity
items.description: Keep your team organized with automated task creation, notifications, and provisioning.

items.title: Inventory & Supply Chain
items.description: Sync inventory levels, track purchase orders, and get alerts before stock runs out.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subheading: A straightforward process designed to deliver value quickly.

steps.title: Audit
steps.description: We map your current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and find the highest-impact automations — then present a clear plan with expected ROI.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We design and implement your automations using the right tools for the job — n8n, Make, Zapier, or custom code — tested and documented.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: We monitor, maintain, and iterate on your automations so they keep working as your business evolves. No set-it-and-forget-it.

security.heading: Your data stays yours
security.subheading: Every engagement includes a data security review. We audit access, enforce permissions, and make sure your data is secure.

about.heading: Who we are
about.subheading: A small team that's done this at scale — now helping growing businesses get the same leverage.

team.name: Bob Colner
team.bio: 10-year Silicon Valley veteran specializing in data science, data engineering, and business analytics. Bob designs and builds the automation systems that make everything run.

team.name: Ben Charney
team.bio: Deep background in sales and business operations. Ben works directly with clients to understand their workflows, identify high-impact opportunities, and keep projects on track.

useCases.heading: Use Cases
useCases.subheading: See how we tackle the most common automation challenges for growing businesses.

items.title: Client & Lead Management
items.problem: Your team spends hours manually entering leads, copying contact info between tools, and sending follow-up emails one at a time. Prospects slip through the cracks because there's no system keeping track of who needs attention next.
items.solution: We build automated pipelines that capture leads from every source, route them to the right person, trigger personalized follow-ups, and keep your CRM updated — so nothing gets missed and your team focuses on closing, not copying.

workflows.name: Web Form to CRM Pipeline
workflows.description: New form submissions are automatically enriched, deduplicated, and added to your CRM with the right owner and stage assigned.

workflows.name: Automated Follow-Up Sequences
workflows.description: Multi-step email and SMS sequences trigger based on lead behavior — opened, clicked, no response — keeping prospects warm without manual effort.

workflows.name: Client Onboarding Workflow
workflows.description: Once a deal closes, automatically send welcome emails, collect documents, create project folders, and assign onboarding tasks to your team.

workflows.name: Appointment Scheduling & Reminders
workflows.description: Prospects book directly from your calendar link. Confirmations, reminders, and follow-ups happen automatically.

items.title: Billing & Financial Ops
items.problem: Invoices are created manually, payments are tracked in spreadsheets, and matching expenses to the right job takes hours of bookkeeping. Financial data lives in multiple systems that don't talk to each other.
items.solution: We connect your billing, accounting, and project tools so invoices are generated automatically, payments are tracked in real time, and financial data stays consistent across every system without manual re-entry.

workflows.name: Auto-Invoice on Milestone
workflows.description: When a project hits a billing milestone, an invoice is automatically generated in QuickBooks or Stripe and sent to the client.

workflows.name: Payment Received Notifications
workflows.description: When a payment lands, your team gets notified in Slack, the CRM record updates, and the project status advances automatically.

workflows.name: Expense-to-Job Matching
workflows.description: Receipts and expenses are parsed with AI, matched to the correct client or project, and synced to your accounting tool.

items.title: Documents & Data Collection
items.problem: You're chasing clients for documents over email, manually sorting attachments into folders, and re-typing form responses into your systems. Important files get lost in inboxes or saved in the wrong place.
items.solution: We automate the entire document lifecycle — from request and collection to extraction, classification, and filing — using AI-powered parsing so your team never has to manually sort or re-enter data again.

workflows.name: Document Request & Collection
workflows.description: Automated email sequences request documents from clients with reminders. Submitted files are auto-named and filed in the correct folder.

workflows.name: AI-Powered Form Processing
workflows.description: Intake form responses are parsed by AI, categorized, and routed to the right workflow or team member based on content.

workflows.name: Email Attachment Sorting
workflows.description: Incoming email attachments are automatically extracted, classified by type, and filed in Google Drive or Dropbox with consistent naming.

workflows.name: Contract Data Extraction
workflows.description: Key terms, dates, and values are extracted from contracts and agreements using OCR and AI, then populated into your tracking system.

items.title: Reporting & Analytics
items.problem: Your data lives in a dozen different tools and nobody has a clear picture of what's happening across the business. Building reports means exporting CSVs, copying into spreadsheets, and hoping the numbers are current.
items.solution: We build automated data pipelines that pull from all your tools, consolidate into a single source of truth, and deliver live dashboards and scheduled reports — so your team always has accurate, up-to-date numbers.

workflows.name: Automated Weekly Report
workflows.description: Every Monday, key metrics are pulled from your CRM, billing, and project tools, compiled into a formatted report, and delivered to your inbox.

workflows.name: KPI Threshold Alerts
workflows.description: When a key metric crosses a threshold — revenue dips, churn spikes, pipeline slows — stakeholders get notified instantly in Slack or email.

workflows.name: Cross-System Data Sync
workflows.description: Data from your CRM, accounting, and project management tools is synced to a central Google Sheet or database on a schedule, deduplicated and cleaned.

items.title: Internal Ops & Productivity
items.problem: New projects kick off without clear task assignments. Team members miss important updates because notifications are scattered across tools. Onboarding a new hire or client means a dozen manual steps that someone inevitably forgets.
items.solution: We automate the operational glue — task creation, notifications, access provisioning, and handoffs — so your team stays aligned and nothing falls through the cracks when work moves between people or stages.

workflows.name: Project Kickoff Automation
workflows.description: When a new project is created, tasks are automatically generated and assigned in your project management tool with deadlines and checklists.

workflows.name: Smart Notification Routing
workflows.description: High-priority form submissions, payments, or support tickets trigger instant alerts to the right team member via Slack, email, or SMS.

workflows.name: Employee Onboarding Workflow
workflows.description: New team members are automatically provisioned with accounts, added to the right channels, assigned training tasks, and introduced to their team.

items.title: Inventory & Supply Chain
items.problem: Inventory counts are tracked in spreadsheets that are always out of date. You find out about stockouts after customers complain. Purchase orders are managed through email chains with no visibility into status.
items.solution: We connect your inventory, e-commerce, and vendor systems so stock levels stay synced in real time, restock alerts fire before you run out, and purchase order status is visible across your entire operation.

workflows.name: Low-Stock Alert & Reorder
workflows.description: When inventory drops below a threshold, your team gets alerted and a draft purchase order is created automatically for review.

workflows.name: Multi-Channel Inventory Sync
workflows.description: Stock levels are synced across your e-commerce platform, POS system, and warehouse in near real-time to prevent overselling.

workflows.name: PO Status Tracking
workflows.description: Purchase order updates from vendors are automatically captured and reflected in your internal tracking system with delivery ETA updates.

contact.heading: Let's talk about what you can automate
contact.subheading: Tell us a bit about your business and we'll come back with ideas.
contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you within one business day.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.privacyNote: We'll only use your info to follow up on your inquiry. No spam, ever.
